en.title: Best Electric Kettles 2026
en.description: Ten electric kettles ranked on temperature control, heat-up speed, build, ease of use, and price — from the Cuisinart PerfecTemp all-rounder to the Fellow Stagg EKG pour-over precision pick.

zh-tw.title: 最佳電熱水壺 2026
zh-tw.description: 從 Cuisinart PerfecTemp 全能首選到 Fellow Stagg EKG 手沖溫控標竿，十款電熱水壺依溫控精度、加熱速度、用料、操作便利與性價比綜合排名。

en.description: A 1.7L cordless kettle with six preset temperatures from 160°F to a full boil, a 30-minute keep-warm, and a 360° base. CNN Underscored named it the 2026 overall winner for matching premium features at a mid-range price.

zh-tw.description: 1.7 公升無線快煮壺，六段預設溫度從 71 度到全沸，保溫 30 分鐘，360 度旋轉底座。CNN Underscored 2026 年選為綜合冠軍，理由是用中階價格給到旗艦級功能。

en.description: The 0.9L pour-over benchmark with PID temperature control to a single degree from 135°F to 212°F, a counterweighted gooseneck spout, a brew stopwatch, and a 60-minute hold.

zh-tw.description: 0.9 公升手沖標竿壺，PID 溫控精準到 1 度，範圍 57 度到 100 度，配重鵝頸壺嘴出水穩，內建沖煮計時器，保溫 60 分鐘。

en.description: A 0.8L stainless gooseneck with five brew presets, a 60-minute keep-warm, and a precise tapered spout, all for a third of the price of the premium pour-over kettles.

zh-tw.description: 0.8 公升不鏽鋼鵝頸壺，五段沖煮預設，保溫 60 分鐘，細嘴出水精準，價格只要高階手沖壺的三分之一。

en.description: A borosilicate glass kettle with a single-knob dial that sets any temperature from 104°F to 212°F in one-degree steps, a 30-minute hold, and the fastest 1500W heat-up in the glass class.

zh-tw.description: 硼矽酸玻璃壺身，單一旋鈕就能設定 40 度到 100 度任意溫度、1 度一階，保溫 30 分鐘，1500W 是玻璃壺裡加熱最快的一台。

en.description: A 1.7L kettle with seven one-touch presets for green, white, oolong, black, herbal tea and coffee, boiling a single cup in about 90 seconds with a 30-minute hold.

zh-tw.description: 1.7 公升快煮壺，七段一鍵預設涵蓋綠茶、白茶、烏龍、紅茶、花草茶和咖啡，單杯水約 90 秒煮沸，保溫 30 分鐘。

en.description: A 1.8L brushed-stainless kettle with five preset brew temperatures for black, green, white and oolong tea plus French press, a 20-minute keep-warm activated at any point in the cycle, and a soft-open lid.

zh-tw.description: 1.8 公升拉絲不鏽鋼壺，五段預設溫度對應紅茶、綠茶、白茶、烏龍與法壓咖啡，保溫 20 分鐘可在加熱任一階段啟動，緩降上蓋。

en.description: A 1.7L double-wall stainless kettle with a cool-touch exterior, no plastic touching the water, a British Strix control, and auto shut-off with boil-dry protection. Consumer Reports rates it top for safety and heat retention.

zh-tw.description: 1.7 公升雙層不鏽鋼壺，外殼不燙手，熱水不接觸塑膠，英國 Strix 控溫元件，自動斷電加防乾燒。Consumer Reports 給安全與保溫最高評等。

en.description: A 1.0L digital gooseneck with six preset temperatures from 140°F to 212°F, a real-flow spout for slow controlled pours, and a heat-and-hold that maintains temperature for up to an hour.

zh-tw.description: 1.0 公升數位鵝頸壺，六段預設溫度從 60 度到 100 度，真實流量壺嘴讓慢速控水更穩，保溫可維持設定溫度長達一小時。

en.description: A 0.8L smart gooseneck that pairs with the VeSync app for custom temperatures, scheduled boils, and a baby-formula mode, heating to a full boil in three to five minutes.

zh-tw.description: 0.8 公升智慧鵝頸壺，連 VeSync App 可自訂溫度、預約煮水、嬰兒沖泡模式，三到五分鐘煮沸。

en.description: A 1.7L stainless kettle with six temperature presets for four teas and French press, 1500W fast heating, a 30-minute keep-warm, and auto shut-off with boil-dry protection at the lowest price in this list.

zh-tw.description: 1.7 公升不鏽鋼壺，六段預設溫度對應四種茶與法壓咖啡，1500W 快煮，保溫 30 分鐘，自動斷電加防乾燒，是這份榜單最便宜的一台。

9 Best Electric Kettles of 2026
The Best Electric Kettles, Lab Tested & Ranked

en.commentary: I keep landing on the same conclusion after testing across this category: the most expensive kettle is rarely the smartest buy, and the Cuisinart PerfecTemp proves it. At roughly $99 it gives you six accurate presets, a 30-minute keep-warm, and a fast 1500W element, which is everything a daily tea and coffee household actually uses. That is why it takes number one over kettles that cost half again as much. The Fellow Stagg EKG earns second on the strength of genuine single-degree PID control and a counterweighted gooseneck that pours like nothing else here, and if your mornings revolve around pour-over it is worth every dollar. The real story of 2026 is how far the value picks have closed the gap. The Cosori Original Gooseneck delivers a controlled tapered pour and five presets for around $69, and the Ninja KT200 boils a single cup in about 90 seconds with seven brew presets for under $50. Spend more only when you have a specific reason: the OXO glass dial for one-degree tuning, the Breville IQ for an all-purpose premium build, or the Secura double wall when a cool-touch body and heat retention matter most. The Hamilton Beach 41020 anchors the budget end and still heats fast with six presets, which makes it the easiest kettle here to recommend to someone who just wants accurate hot water without overthinking it.

highlights.title: The Cuisinart PerfecTemp is the kettle most people should buy
highlights.body: It hits the exact sweet spot of price and capability. Six presets cover every tea and French press temperature, the keep-warm holds for 30 minutes, and the 1500W element reaches a boil quickly. For around $99 it matches features that premium kettles charge $150 or more for, and that is the whole reason it wins overall.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG is the pour-over precision standard
highlights.body: Single-degree PID control means the water actually holds the temperature you set, drifting within a degree or two for up to an hour. The counterweighted gooseneck gives you slow, exact pours over the coffee bed, and the built-in stopwatch turns brewing into a repeatable process. For serious pour-over, this is the one to beat.

highlights.title: Cosori's gooseneck is the value shock of the category
highlights.body: At around $69 it brings a tapered precision spout, five brew presets, and a 60-minute keep-warm to a price that undercuts the premium pour-over kettles by more than half. The pour control is genuinely good for the money, which makes it the smartest entry point for anyone curious about pour-over coffee.

highlights.title: Match the temperature mechanism to how you brew
highlights.body: Preset-button kettles like the Ninja and Hamilton Beach are fastest for everyday tea swapping. Dial and PID kettles like the OXO and Stagg give one-degree control for people who chase exact extraction. Pick the interface that fits your routine, because that decides daily satisfaction more than any spec sheet number.

zh-tw.commentary: 我在這個品類來回實測之後，結論一直是同一個：最貴的那台很少是最聰明的選擇，Cuisinart PerfecTemp 就是最好的證明。差不多三千出頭的價位，給你六段準確預設、保溫 30 分鐘、1500W 快熱，這些剛好就是一個每天泡茶喝咖啡的家庭真正會用到的功能，所以它壓過貴上一半的對手拿下第一，老實講很合理。第二名 Fellow Stagg EKG 靠的是真正的 1 度 PID 控溫，加上配重鵝頸壺嘴出水穩到沒有對手，如果你的早晨就是繞著手沖轉，這個價錢花得值得。2026 年真正的看點，是平價款把差距拉得有多近。Cosori 原廠鵝頸壺兩千出頭就給你細嘴控水和五段預設，Ninja KT200 不到一千六、單杯水約 90 秒煮沸還附七段預設。要花更多錢，得有明確理由：OXO 玻璃旋鈕要的是 1 度微調，Breville IQ 要的是全能高階用料，Secura 雙層壺要的是外殼不燙手加保溫。墊底的 Hamilton Beach 41020 一千出頭，照樣快熱又有六段預設，是這份榜單裡最容易推薦給「只想要準確熱水、不想想太多」的人那一台。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfecTemp 是大多數人該買的那一台
highlights.body: 它剛好打中價格和能力的甜蜜點。六段預設涵蓋所有茶種和法壓溫度，保溫撐 30 分鐘，1500W 很快煮沸。三千出頭就給到旗艦壺要價四五千的功能，這就是它拿下綜合第一的全部理由。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 是手沖溫控的標竿
highlights.body: 1 度 PID 控溫代表水真的會穩在你設定的溫度，一小時內最多飄一兩度。配重鵝頸壺嘴讓你在咖啡粉層上慢慢精準地繞圈，內建計時器把沖煮變成可重複的流程。認真玩手沖，這台就是要被超越的對象。

highlights.title: Cosori 鵝頸壺是這個品類的性價比震撼彈
highlights.body: 兩千出頭就帶來細嘴精準出水、五段沖煮預設、保溫 60 分鐘，價格比高階手沖壺低一半還有找。以這個價位來說控水真的好用，對任何想入坑手沖咖啡的人來說，這是最聰明的起點。

highlights.title: 把控溫方式對準你的沖泡習慣
highlights.body: Ninja、Hamilton Beach 這種按鍵預設壺，日常換著泡各種茶最快上手。OXO、Stagg 這種旋鈕和 PID 壺，給的是追求精準萃取的人要的 1 度控制。選對操作介面，這比規格表上任何數字都更能決定你每天用得爽不爽。

en.commentary: The electric kettle list is unchanged this week, and the latest round of reviews only reinforces my order. The Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 stays at number one because it keeps doing the thing that actually wins this category: six clearly labeled temperature presets right on the handle, a generous 1.7-liter capacity, and a price that undercuts fancier rivals while matching their features. For most kitchens that is the smart buy, full stop. The Fellow Stagg EKG holds second as the pour-over specialist, and reviewers keep praising its gooseneck spout for the slow, precise stream that gives you real control when brewing coffee. If you take pour-over seriously, that precision is worth the premium. The Cosori Gooseneck CO108 stays third as the value gooseneck that gets you most of the way to the Fellow for less. Below them the OXO Brew, Ninja Precision, and Breville IQ continue to cover the variable-temperature middle ground well. There is no new launch or pricing move this week that justifies a reshuffle. This is a mature category where temperature control, pour quality, and value decide everything, and my current picks still own all three. Scores held flat.

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 is the smart default
highlights.body: Six labeled presets on the handle, 1.7 liters, and a price below fancier rivals with the same features. For most kitchens this is the easy, no-regrets pick and it stays at number one.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG owns pour-over
highlights.body: The gooseneck spout delivers a slow, precise stream that gives real control when brewing coffee. If pour-over is your ritual, the precision is worth the premium.

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 is the value gooseneck
highlights.body: It gets you most of the way to the Fellow's pour control for noticeably less. A smart pick for coffee fans who want the gooseneck shape without the flagship price.

highlights.title: The variable-temp middle holds firm
highlights.body: The OXO Brew, Ninja Precision, and Breville IQ keep covering the precise-temperature crowd well. Reliable picks if you want preset control without committing to a gooseneck.

zh-tw.commentary: 這週電熱水壺清單沒有變動，最新一輪評測也更鞏固我的排序。Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 守在第一，因為它一直把這個類別真正的勝負手做好：手把上六段清楚標示的溫度預設、寬裕的 1.7 公升容量，加上比更花俏的對手便宜卻又功能不少的價格。對多數廚房，這就是聰明買法，沒別的話好說。Fellow Stagg EKG 守在第二當手沖專門款，評測一直稱讚它的鵝頸壺嘴能倒出又慢又準的水流，沖咖啡時控制感十足。如果你認真玩手沖，這份精準值得多花。Cosori Gooseneck CO108 穩坐第三，是用更少預算就能接近 Fellow 的高 CP 鵝頸壺。再下來 OXO Brew、Ninja Precision 跟 Breville IQ 繼續把可調溫的中段守得很好。這週沒有新機上市、也沒有價格變動，沒理由重排。這是個成熟類別，溫控、出水品質跟 CP 值決定一切，而我目前的選擇這三項都還握在手上。分數維持不動。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfecTemp CPK-17 是聰明預設
highlights.body: 手把上六段標示清楚的預設、1.7 公升容量，價格還壓在功能相同的花俏對手之下。對多數廚房就是省心不後悔的選擇，穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 是手沖王
highlights.body: 鵝頸壺嘴倒出又慢又準的水流，沖咖啡時控制感滿滿。手沖是你的儀式感，這份精準就值得多花。

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 是高 CP 鵝頸壺
highlights.body: 用明顯更少的預算就能接近 Fellow 的出水控制。想要鵝頸造型又不想花旗艦價的咖啡迷，這台很聰明。

highlights.title: 可調溫中段穩住
highlights.body: OXO Brew、Ninja Precision 跟 Breville IQ 繼續把要精準控溫的族群守得很好。想要預設控溫又不想上鵝頸的話，都是可靠選擇。

en.commentary: The Cuisinart PerfectTemp CPK-17 stays my top all-rounder, and the logic is simple: it gives you six preset temperatures, a 90-minute keep-warm, fast boiling, and a roomy 1.7-liter capacity at a price that undercuts the boutique names. For a household that wants precise water for tea and pour-over without overthinking it, this is the kettle I hand people. The Fellow Stagg EKG holds second as the precision benchmark, and the latest 2026 round-ups confirm it: reviewers measure its temperature drift at roughly half a degree, the tightest in the category, and its gooseneck spout pours with a control that serious coffee people genuinely feel. You pay a premium for that polish, which is the only reason it is not first. The Cosori CO108 keeps third as the value gooseneck, delivering most of the Stagg's pour control for far less, the smart pick for someone starting pour-over without a big budget. Below that, the OXO Brew remains the speed-and-precision value play at around 79 dollars, and the Ninja KT200 stays the fastest boiler here. Nothing moved this week. The category is mature, the trade-off between all-purpose convenience and gooseneck precision is well understood, and the right kettle simply depends on whether you brew pour-over or just want hot water fast.

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp is the all-rounder
highlights.body: Six presets, a 90-minute keep-warm, fast boiling, and 1.7 liters at a price under the boutique names. For precise tea and pour-over water without fuss, this is the one I hand people.

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG is the precision benchmark
highlights.body: Reviewers measure its drift at about half a degree, the tightest here, and the gooseneck pours with control serious coffee people feel. The price premium is the only reason it sits second.

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 is the value gooseneck
highlights.body: It delivers most of the Stagg's pour control for far less money. If you are starting pour-over on a budget, this is the smart entry that does not feel like a compromise.

highlights.title: Match the kettle to how you brew
highlights.body: Want fast hot water and presets, buy the Cuisinart. Want laminar pour control for coffee, buy a gooseneck. The category is settled, so this single question decides your pick.

zh-tw.commentary: Cuisinart PerfectTemp CPK-17 還是我心中最全能的一台，邏輯很簡單：六段預設溫度、90 分鐘保溫、加熱快、1.7 公升容量夠大，價格還壓在那些精品品牌底下。對一個想泡茶、做手沖都要精準水溫、又不想想太多的家庭來說，我就是把這台遞給他們。Fellow Stagg EKG 守第二，是精準度的標竿，2026 最新評比也確認了，評測量到它的溫度漂移大約只有半度，是這個品類裡最緊的，那個鵝頸壺嘴倒水時的控制感，認真玩咖啡的人是真的感受得到。為了這份精緻你得多付一筆，這也是它沒能排第一的唯一原因。Cosori CO108 守第三，是性價比鵝頸壺，用低很多的價格給你大部分 Stagg 的注水控制，剛入門手沖又預算有限的人選它很聰明。再往下，OXO Brew 還是台幣兩千出頭、兼顧速度跟精準的性價比選擇，Ninja KT200 則是這裡煮最快的。這週名次沒動。這個品類已經成熟，全能便利跟鵝頸精準之間的取捨大家都懂，講白了，挑哪台就看你是要做手沖，還是只想快點有熱水。

highlights.title: Cuisinart PerfectTemp 是全能王
highlights.body: 六段預設、90 分鐘保溫、加熱快、1.7 公升夠大，價格還壓在精品品牌底下。想要精準的泡茶跟手沖水溫又不想煩，我就遞這台。

highlights.title: Fellow Stagg EKG 是精準標竿
highlights.body: 評測量到漂移約半度，是這裡最緊的，鵝頸注水的控制感認真玩咖啡的人感受得到。要多付那筆精緻費，是它排第二的唯一原因。

highlights.title: Cosori CO108 是性價比鵝頸壺
highlights.body: 用低很多的價格給你大部分 Stagg 的注水控制。預算有限又想入門手沖的話，這台是聰明的起點，用起來不會覺得在將就。

highlights.title: 照你的沖泡習慣選壺
highlights.body: 要快熱水跟預設溫度就買 Cuisinart，要手沖的綿密注水控制就買鵝頸壺。品類已定型，這一個問題就能決定你該買哪台。

再往下 OXO Brew 跟 Ninja Precision 顧好日常快煮，Breville 收在高階這端。這禮拜沒有新品或降價足以撼動榜單，所以名次跟分數我全留。這種成熟到不行的類別，穩才是誠實的判斷，我寧可叫大家看 Cuisinart 拚性價比、Fellow 拚工藝，也不硬湊排名變化。

Buy the Cuisinart for a do-everything household kettle, buy the Fellow if precision pouring and design matter, and buy the Cosori when you want gooseneck control without the premium. The Cosori CO108 remains the value gooseneck I hand to anyone starting pour over, since it delivers single degree control at less than half the Fellow price. The OXO Brew stays in the mix for people who want accurate heating without fuss, and the Ninja KT200 is still the speed champion when you just want boiling water fast. If you drink green tea, French press, and pour over in the same week, variable temperature earns its keep. If you only want fast boiling water for pasta and tea bags, a simple fixed kettle still does the job beautifully.
